title: Repealed
doc_html:
§3048.1. Repealed by Acts 2015, No. 227, §3.

            NOTE: See Acts 2015, No. 227, §4, relative to R.S. 17:3048.1(A)(1)(a)(i), (ii), and (iii)(ee)(III) and (S)(1) through (3) as repealed by Act No. 227 remaining in effect for students, if applicable.
